steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage describes difficulties documenting nocturnal pollinator visits and notes that research has focused on diurnal invertebrates. The blank must name what this situation created regarding knowledge of nocturnal moths.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — an abatement: means a reduction or lessening — not a shortage of information. ✗
  • Choice B — an aggregation: means a gathering or collection — the opposite of what is described. ✗
  • Choice C — a dearth: means a scarcity or lack — fits perfectly; documentation difficulties and diurnal focus left a gap in knowledge about nocturnal moths. ✓
  • Choice D — a dissonance: means disagreement or conflict — no clash of views is described. ✗
That matches Choice C — a dearth.
